extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won a headwind-neutralized sprint stage after SHACHMANN Maximilian took bonus seconds at the intermediate sprint to move closer to race lead
tactical_patterns: SHACHMANN contested intermediate sprint 16.2km from finish, taking 2 bonus seconds to close GC gap despite not contesting stage win
GILBERT Philip initiated echelon attempt at 66km to go when slight crosswind appeared, but GROUP AAMA chased to protect DEMAR
Sustained 66.5kph pace before echelon reabsorption suggests teams now immediately respond to any wind direction change regardless of strength

rider_signals.SHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: prioritized intermediate sprint bonuses over stage result, intelligent GC time-gaining when favorites weren't focused
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: won from extremely high pace sprint after MORKOV leadout, suggesting superior power at high initial speeds
rider_signals.DEMAR Arnaud: neutral: GROUP AAMA chased for him but he didn't feature in finale, possibly positioning error
